summary: Excellent soundboard recording with a crisp mix captures a classic May ’77 set highlighted by Terrapin Station, Estimated Prophet, Eyes of the World, Sugaree and High Time.
review: The show is praised as a quintessential spring‑'77 performance – a tight setlist that rolls from Terrapin > Estimated > Eyes into a monster Sugaree and a gorgeous High Time, with an especially strong second half and encore. The recording benefits from a clean soundboard source (with audience patches for reel flips) and a well‑balanced mix by the Owen Brothers, delivering clear and enjoyable audio throughout.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviewers give 4–5 stars, emphasizing both a superb musical performance and high‑quality sound; the weighted average of show (70%) and recording (30%) yields an overall rating in the very good to excellent range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clean, crisp mix noted by reviewers; audience source used only for reel‑flip patches, preserving the integrity of the whole show.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Classic May ’77 flow with a strong second half and encore; reviewers highlight the seamless progression from Terrapin > Estimated > Eyes and the overall great setlist.
